audit_scope: Backend batch closeout gate covering PASS-0000..PASS-0006 (the manual worktree-pool model swap). Independent clean-context audit; [FE]/in-app surface (PASS-0007..0009) is out of this batch's scope.

non_blocking_findings.summary: RetryWorkloadRun still calls provisionOwnedLane (fresh os.MkdirTemp lane) on the workload-failure recovery path.
non_blocking_findings.why_it_matters: A retried workload provisions a fresh random-temp lane rather than drawing from the pool. Not an AC violation (the task only required dispatchWithDirective to switch to pool-draw, which it did), but it is residual inconsistency with the pure-pool model worth a future-pass decision.

non_blocking_findings.summary: Stale commit flags in per-pass CHECKLIST.json (e.g. commit_created=false) although the 7 commits landed on master.
non_blocking_findings.why_it_matters: Cosmetic staleness in producer checklist JSON written pre-commit; not a correctness issue.

non_blocking_findings.summary: classifyPoolMember trusts the persisted record (marks allocated) when s.runtime == nil.
non_blocking_findings.why_it_matters: Runtime-less test-convenience path; production always has a runtime so the live-classification guarantee holds. Informational.

evidence_reviewed: TASK.md [BE] acceptance criteria 1-15 + What Does Not Count
internal/taskrun/pool.go, service.go; internal/queue/consumer.go, provider.go, slots.go, decision.go, manifest.go, registry_consumer.go; internal/httpapi/mux.go
Tests: queue/consumer_test.go, queue/provider_test.go, taskrun/pool_test.go, taskrun/slots_test.go, httpapi/worktrees_pool_test.go
Independently re-ran: go build ./... (exit 0); go test ./... uncached (all ok, no FAIL); gofmt -l internal/ (clean); grep for cap symbols (only doc-comments/ignored-legacy-key tests remain)
suggested_next_step: Proceed to the UI batch (PASS-0007..0009) on these endpoints. Carry the RetryWorkloadRun finding forward as a future-pass decision. Do NOT mark Task-0016 closed — closure remains the human gate on the working in-app WORKTREES surface, which this backend batch deliberately does not deliver.
